text_original: bloody disgusting i cant continue my interaction with out paying more? if it looks like fraud ....
text_zh: 太恶心了，不付更多钱我就无法继续互动？这看起来就像是诈骗……
reply_original: Hi there, I'm truly sorry for the frustration. To be transparent, running high-quality AI involves high server costs, which is why we have chat limits. We never want you to feel cheated. Please email us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID so we can look into your account and help you further. Thank you for your patience.
reply_zh: 你好，对于给您带来的不快，我们深表歉意。坦白地说，运行高质量的 AI 需要高昂的服务器成本，这就是我们设置聊天限制的原因。我们绝不希望您感到被骗。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai 并附上您的 UID，以便我们核查您的账户并为您提供进一步的帮助。感谢您的耐心。
